name: captions
title: Captions
description: Sequential word-by-word captions driven by a timed array. The active word lifts in --onda-text with a subtle SPRING_SMOOTH scale pulse; surrounding words sit dim in --onda-dim. The data primitive for kinetic transcripts and AI-generated voiceover.
pickWhen: synced subtitles over voiceover or video — transcripts, AI voiceover, talking-head clips. Pass a timed array; not for static text.
